allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./data/templates.v2.json''\); console.log\(''Total templates:'', d.templates.length\); console.log\(''Version:'', d.version\); const types = {}; d.templates.forEach\(t => { types[t.plan_type_key] = \(types[t.plan_type_key]||0\)+1 }\); console.log\(''By type:'', types\); const pools = {}; d.templates.forEach\(t => { pools[t.metadata.pool_type] = \(pools[t.metadata.pool_type]||0\)+1 }\); console.log\(''By pool:'', pools\); const diffs = {}; d.templates.forEach\(t => { diffs[t.metadata.difficulty] = \(diffs[t.metadata.difficulty]||0\)+1 }\); console.log\(''By difficulty:'', diffs\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./data/templates.v2.json''\); console.log\(''Top-level keys:'', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\(''Version:'', d.version\); console.log\(''Templates count:'', d.templates?.length\); console.log\(''Sample metadata fields:'', d.templates?.[0]?.metadata ? Object.keys\(d.templates[0].metadata\) : ''N/A''\);")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./data/templates.v2.json''\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({version: d.version, generated_at: d.generated_at, stats: d.stats}, null, 2\)\);")
